title: 4 Dividend-Paying Multiline Insurers to Add to Your Portfolio
text: Multiline insurers like MGIC Investment Corporation (MTG), CNO Financial (CNO), Old Republic International Corporation (ORI) and The Hartford Financial Services Group (HIG), which have an impressive dividend history, offer a breather amid volatility.

title: 19 Upcoming Dividend Increases, Including 3 Kings
text: Three dividend kings are featured this week: Stepan Company, Tennant Company, and Lancaster Colony Corporation. December is the last opportunity for companies to announce yearly dividend increases. Tables and metrics are provided for investors to prioritize current yield and historical dividend growth rates.

title: Hartford Financial: 4 Reasons Why I Am Bullish
text: The Hartford Financial Services Group has undergone a significant transformation in recent years. The company has benefited from rising interest rates over the past few years and is poised to benefit if rates remain elevated. HIG has implemented an aggressive share repurchase program ,which suggests that management views the stock as highly undervalued.

title: Hartford Financial: Catalysts Are Playing Out As Expected
text: HIG's recent shareholder capital return in the form of dividends and buybacks is decent, and medical inflation hasn't had a meaningful impact on the profitability of the Workers' Compensation business. Hartford Financial's Group Benefits business has surprised the market in a positive manner with its substantial ROE expansion for the recent quarter. I still rate HIG as a Buy, as the catalysts for the stock are playing out well as per my expectations.

title: 4 Best Stocks Exhibiting Solid Earnings Growth
text: Invest in stocks such as DexCom (DXCM), Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG), Limbach (LMB) and Hartford Financial Services (HIG) for superb earnings growth.
